name: shots
description: Generate App Store screenshots, app icons, screenshot localization, ASO listing copy, and App Store inspiration workflows through hosted Shots MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Generate App Store screenshots, app icons, screenshot localization, and ASO listing copy from natural language. Describe your screenshots in a prompt, import your own App Store URL, or use another App Store listing as public gallery inspiration, then generate, revise, translate, and ship publish-ready assets for iPhone, iPad, Android, and Apple Watch. Includes ASO keyword ideas, listing copy generation, 50+ locale localization, deep category research, screenshot audits, inspiration gallery workflows, and app icon moodboarding from your coding agent.
defaultPrompt: Make screenshots like another App Store app
Research keywords for my app category
